title: WeftOS Block Descriptor
description: Self-contained JSON document defining a renderable UI assembly. One descriptor can render to React (Tauri desktop), Terminal (Ink/xterm.js), Mentra HUD (400x240 constraint), PDF, MCP, and Shell targets.

root.description: ID of the root element in the elements map. Must be a key in 'elements'.

elements.description: Flat adjacency-list map of element ID to element definition. IDs must be non-empty strings.

creator.description: Who created this descriptor. Convention: 'user:<name>' or 'agent:<agent_id>'.

tags.description: Tags for catalog search and filtering.

governance_seq.description: ExoChain sequence number of the governance approval event for this descriptor.

target_hint.description: Preferred render target. Renderers may ignore this hint if they handle the descriptor natively.

refresh_hz.description: Suggested refresh rate for $state bindings, in Hertz.

type.description: Block type name. Must exist in the Block Catalog.

children.description: Ordered list of child element IDs. Only layout blocks (Column, Row, Grid, Tabs) may have children.

props.description: Props specific to this block type. Values may be literals or $state references.

on.description: Event handlers. Keys are event names (e.g., 'press', 'voice_select', 'change'). Values are actions.

ports.description: Data port bindings for inter-block communication.

PropValue.description: A prop value: literal (string, number, boolean, null, array, object) or a $state reference.

StateRef.description: Reference to kernel state, resolved at render time via the StateStore.

$state.description: JSON Pointer path into the StateStore (e.g., '/kernel/metrics/cpu_percent'). Must start with '/'.

$default.description: Fallback value if the path is not yet available in the StateStore.

$transform.description: Transform function name applied to the resolved value (e.g., 'percent', 'humanBytes', 'truncate').

FormatStateRef.description: State reference with a format template string. The resolved value is interpolated into the template at {v}.

$state.description: JSON Pointer path into the StateStore.

format.description: Template string where {v} is replaced by the resolved value.

BlockAction.description: An action triggered by a block event. Routed through the Action Catalog.

action.description: Action type from the Action Catalog.

params.description: Static parameters merged with event data at dispatch time.

governed.description: Whether to require a governance check before executing this action.

PortBinding.description: Declares a data port for inter-block communication via the PortBus.

direction.description: 'in' receives data from another block's output port. 'out' emits data for other blocks to consume.

source.description: For 'in' ports: identifies the source element and port name.

element.description: Source element ID within the same descriptor.

port.description: Port name on the source element.

publish.description: For 'out' ports: $state path where data is published to the StateStore.

LayoutHints.description: Layout hints for the block engine. Interpreted differently by each renderer.

width.description: Width in grid units (12-column grid system).

x.description: Absolute X position in canvas mode (pixels).

y.description: Absolute Y position in canvas mode (pixels).

resizable.description: Whether the user can resize this block.
